en: Can you say this popular tongue twister in English Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers
ko: 이 유명한 영어 혀 꼬임말을 말할 수 있어? Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers

en: Notice at the beginning of each of these words there is a puff of air It's a good way to practice a P sound
ko: 각 단어 시작에 공기가 빠져나가는 거 봐. P 소리를 연습하기 좋은 방법이야

en: puh puh puh Let's say it again and do it faster and faster and faster Peter Piper picked a
ko: puh puh puh. 다시 말하면서 점점 빨리 해보자. Peter Piper picked a

en: peck of pickled peppers Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers Whew I did it
ko: peck of pickled peppers. Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. 휴 해냈어!
